top3.sql:
SELECT state
FROM (
    SELECT lt.state, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM legislators_terms lt
    JOIN legislators l ON lt.id_bioguide = l.id_bioguide
    WHERE l.gender = 'F'
      AND lt.term_end >= '1776-12-31'
      AND lt.term_start <= '1776-12-31'
    GROUP BY lt.state
    ORDER BY count DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT state
FROM (
    SELECT lt.state, COUNT(*) as count
    FROM legislators_terms lt
    JOIN legislators l ON lt.id_bioguide = l.id_bioguide
    WHERE l.gender = 'F'
      AND lt.term_end >= '1900-12-31'
    GROUP BY lt.state
    ORDER BY count DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT state
FROM (
    SELECT lt.state, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM legislators_terms lt
    JOIN legislators l ON lt.id_bioguide = l.id_bioguide
    WHERE l.gender = 'F'
      AND lt.term_end >= '1776-12-31'
      AND lt.term_start <= '1776-12-31'
    GROUP BY lt.state
    ORDER BY count DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT state
FROM (
    SELECT lt.state, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM legislators_terms lt
    JOIN legislators l ON lt.id_bioguide = l.id_bioguide
    WHERE l.gender = 'F'
      AND '12-31' BETWEEN substr(lt.term_start, 6, 5) AND substr(lt.term_end, 6, 5)
    GROUP BY lt.state
    ORDER BY count DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

final.sql:
SELECT state
FROM (
    SELECT lt.state, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM legislators_terms lt
    JOIN legislators l ON lt.id_bioguide = l.id_bioguide
    WHERE l.gender = 'F'
      AND lt.term_end >= '1776-12-31'
      AND lt.term_start <= '1776-12-31'
    GROUP BY lt.state
    ORDER BY count DESC
    LIMIT 1
);
